nasb.text: They journeyed from Oboth and camped at Iye-abarim, in the wilderness which is opposite Moab, to the east.

esv.text: And they set out from Oboth and camped at Iye-abarim, in the wilderness that is opposite Moab, toward the sunrise.

cnv.text: 再從阿伯起行，在以耶．亞巴琳安營，就是摩押對面的曠野，向日出之地。

ccb.text: 又从阿伯动身，走到摩押东边的旷野，在以耶·亚巴琳安营；
